name: agent_task
description: Intent packet emitted by an AI agent after reading a SpatialManifest. Broadcast to all clients in the domain. Physics layer has no visibility into this type.

fields.name: task_id
fields.description: Monotonically increasing task ID set by the agent

fields.name: origin_id
fields.description: Entity ID of the agent body; 0 = anonymous

fields.name: intent
fields.description: Natural language statement of what the agent will do and why

fields.name: action
fields.description: One action from the world surface vocabulary

fields.name: context
fields.description: Object IDs the agent is acting on (u64 each); empty = world-scope

fields.name: deadline_ms
fields.description: Deadline in ms from now; 0 = no deadline
